name: High Roller of the Inferno
text:
Flying
Whenever a player rolls one or more dice (yours, theirs, anyone's), High Roller of the Inferno gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the highest single result rolled.
At the beginning of your end step, if High Roller's power is 13 or greater, each opponent loses 3 life. The whales always tip in blood.
flavorText: He bets in lifespans and tips in decades. The pit boss comps him a throne.

extras.dice: grows off the highest die rolled by anyone
